tests.q: Calculate fifteen times seven plus twenty three
tests.a:
To calculate fifteen times seven plus twenty-three, you simply perform the multiplication and addition:

15 × 7 = 105
105 + 23 = 128

So, fifteen times seven plus twenty-three equals 128.
